This incident highlights how political policies directly intervene in cultural exchange and artistic expression, excluding humanitarian narratives from the world's most prominent film stage. It demonstrates the disproportionate impact of travel restrictions on marginalized groups while simultaneously bringing wider attention to a film about a child's tragedy in Gaza. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

可关注该片及同类纪录片，了解政策限制背后的人文故事；在跨境合作或国际活动中，提前评估参与者的签证与入境政策风险；对于创作者而言，可思考如何通过数字发行、线上首映等替代渠道，突破地理政治壁垒触达全球观众。
Follow this film and similar documentaries to understand human stories behind policy restrictions; for international collaborations, assess visa and entry policy risks for participants in advance; creators can explore alternative channels like digital distribution and online premieres to reach global audiences despite geopolitical barriers.

What are Hong Kong’s next best steps after ‘two sessions’ in Beijing?

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章讨论了2025年中国"两会"后香港的发展方向，分析专家和两会代表提出的建议。核心议题是香港如何从"以香港为中心"的思维转向主动对接国家战略，包括强化国际金融中心地位、建设全球创新科技枢纽，并发挥"超级联系人"的准外交功能。
This article discusses Hong Kong's development direction after China's 2025 "Two Sessions," featuring suggestions from analysts and NPC/CPPCC members. The core theme is Hong Kong's shift from a "Hong Kong-centred" mindset to proactively aligning with national strategies, including strengthening its role as an international financial centre, building a global innovation and technology hub, and serving as a "superconnector" with quasi-diplomatic functions. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这标志着中央对港定位的根本性转变：从被动"请求支持"转向主动"服务国家"，反映地缘政治紧张局势下香港角色的重新校准。香港独特的普通法体系、金融货币中心地位和航空枢纽优势，使其成为国家对外战略的关键节点，这一转型将深刻影响香港未来的产业政策、人才流动和国际合作模式。
This marks a fundamental shift in Beijing's positioning of Hong Kong: from passively "asking for support" to actively "serving national development," reflecting a recalibration of Hong Kong's role amid geopolitical tensions. Hong Kong's unique common law system, financial centre status, and aviation hub advantages make it a critical node in China's external strategy, a transformation that will profoundly shape the city's industrial policy, talent flows, and international cooperation models. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

对于政策研究者，可追踪"十五五"规划中香港具体配套政策的落地；对于企业和投资者，可关注金融科技、跨境数据流动、国际仲裁等领域的制度红利；对于个人发展，可评估普通法背景、双语能力及国际网络在"超级联系人"角色中的差异化竞争优势。
For policy researchers, track the implementation of specific supporting policies for Hong Kong in the 15th Five-Year Plan; for businesses and investors, monitor institutional dividends in fintech, cross-border data flows, and international arbitration; for individual development, assess the competitive advantages of common law background, bilingual capabilities, and international networks in the "superconnector" role.

Which Chinese stocks can help investors withstand Middle East war shocks?

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

本文分析了中东战争引发油价飙升背景下，中国股市中哪些板块能够帮助投资者抵御冲击。文章指出能源、石化和农业等具有定价权的中国企业，能够通过转嫁成本或受益于替代能源需求，在避险情绪中实现逆势增长。
This article analyzes which sectors in China's stock market can help investors withstand shocks from the Middle East war amid surging oil prices. It identifies energy, petrochemical, and agriculture companies with pricing power as beneficiaries that can pass on costs or gain from alternative energy demand during risk-off sentiment.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

地缘政治冲突正通过能源价格渠道重塑全球资产配置逻辑，传统避险资产（债券、美元）与风险资产（股票）同步承压，迫使投资者寻找结构性机会。中国企业的成本转嫁能力和国内通胀回升趋势，使其成为对抗滞胀风险的独特选择，这也反映了全球供应链重构中"定价权"的核心价值。
Geopolitical conflicts are reshaping global asset allocation through energy price channels, with traditional safe havens (bonds, USD) and risk assets (stocks) simultaneously under pressure, forcing investors to seek structural opportunities. Chinese firms' cost-passing ability and domestic inflation recovery make them unique hedges against stagflation risks, reflecting the core value of "pricing power" amid global supply chain restructuring.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

投资者可关注三类标的：直接受益于油价上涨的能源/煤炭股、具备产品提价能力的石化龙头（如卫星化学等案例）、以及替代能源和农业板块。同时应建立"定价权筛选框架"——优先选择成本传导顺畅、行业集中度高的企业，并将此类分析框架迁移至其他地缘冲突场景的投资决策中。
Investors can focus on three categories: energy/coal stocks directly benefiting from oil prices, petrochemical leaders with pricing power (e.g., Satellite Chemical), and alternative energy/agriculture sectors. Build a "pricing power screening framework"—prioritizing firms with smooth cost transmission and high industry concentration—and migrate this analytical framework to investment decisions under other geopolitical conflict scenarios.

Hong Kong to boost direct flights, transfer capacity amid Middle East turmoil

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

香港运输及物流局局长陈美宝表示，当局正与航空公司协调，增加直飞航班和中转运力，将中东局势（美以与伊朗冲突）造成的航空中断转化为发展机遇。香港机场的三跑道系统及重新启用的二号客运大楼将为此提供基础设施支持。
Hong Kong's Secretary for Transport and Logistics Mable Chan announced that authorities are working with airlines to increase direct flights and transfer capacity, turning aviation disruptions caused by the Middle East conflict (US-Israel war on Iran) into development opportunities. The airport's three-runway system and the reopened Terminal 2 will provide infrastructure support for this initiative. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

中东局势已严重扰乱全球贸易和航空网络，凸显香港需减少对传统石油依赖、拓展供应来源的必要性。此举既能提升香港作为国际航空枢纽的竞争力，也反映了地缘政治动荡下全球供应链重构的趋势，为香港机场巩固亚太转运中心地位创造窗口期。
The Middle East turmoil has severely disrupted global trade and aviation networks, highlighting the need for Hong Kong to reduce reliance on traditional oil and diversify supply sources. This move enhances Hong Kong's competitiveness as an international aviation hub and reflects the trend of global supply chain restructuring amid geopolitical instability, creating a window for the airport to solidify its position as an Asia-Pacific transit center. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注香港至欧美新增直飞航线及中转优惠，优化商务出行或物流安排；企业可评估利用香港机场作为替代中转枢纽，规避中东航线风险；投资者可跟踪本地航空股及机场相关基建板块，把握运力扩张带来的潜在机会。
Monitor new direct routes and transfer promotions between Hong Kong and Europe/US to optimize business travel or logistics arrangements; companies can evaluate using Hong Kong Airport as an alternative transit hub to mitigate Middle East route risks; investors may track local airline stocks and airport-related infrastructure sectors to capture potential opportunities from capacity expansion.

📅 2026-03-13 63

Hackaday Podcast Episode 361: Hackaday Podcast Mailbag, A Phone is Not a Computer, 3D Printing History is New Again

Hackaday

是什么 / What it is

这是一期 Hackaday Podcast 第 361 期节目，由编辑 Elliot Williams 和 Tom Nardi 主持，涵盖本周精选的黑客项目与技术故事，包括交通信号欺骗、3D 打印设备评测、手机能否替代电脑的讨论，以及自制电子阅读器等内容。
This is Episode 361 of the Hackaday Podcast, hosted by editors Elliot Williams and Tom Nardi, covering weekly curated hacking projects and tech stories including traffic signal spoofing, 3D printing equipment reviews, debates on whether phones can replace computers, and DIY e-reader projects. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

该节目反映了硬件黑客文化的持续活力——从破解公共基础设施信号到探索消费级 3D 打印设备的边界，展示了技术民主化如何降低创新门槛。同时，"手机 vs 电脑"的讨论触及了计算设备形态演变的深层趋势，而 Pokemon Go 开发商将玩家行为货币化的案例则揭示了数据经济的新模式。
This episode reflects the continued vitality of hardware hacking culture—from cracking public infrastructure signals to exploring the boundaries of consumer 3D printing equipment—demonstrating how technological democratization lowers barriers to innovation. Meanwhile, the "phone vs. computer" discussion touches on deep trends in computing device evolution, while the case of Pokemon Go's developer monetizing player behavior reveals new patterns in the data economy. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

可参考节目中提到的硬件黑客教程资源提升逆向工程技能；关注 Creality M1 耗材拉丝机等新设备的实际评测，为采购决策提供依据；尝试将废旧计算器改造为电子阅读器这类低门槛项目，或探索用日常材料（如巧克力糖果）进行创意编程教学的实验。
You can refer to the hardware hacking tutorial resources mentioned in the episode to improve reverse engineering skills; follow hands-on reviews of new equipment like the Creality M1 filament maker to inform purchasing decisions; try low-barrier projects like converting old calculators into e-readers, or explore experiments in creative programming education using everyday materials like chocolate candies.

Cartel boss on US ‘most wanted’ list captured in Bolivia raid

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

玻利维亚警方于周五凌晨突袭圣克鲁斯两处住宅，抓获了被美国列入"头号通缉"名单的乌拉圭籍毒枭塞巴斯蒂安·恩里克·马尔塞特·卡布雷拉。此人因贩毒指控被美方悬赏200万美元，被捕后立即被引渡至美国。 Bolivian police captured Uruguayan drug lord Sebastian Enrique Marset Cabrera, who was on the US "most wanted" list with a $2 million bounty, during dawn raids on two houses in Santa Cruz. He was immediately transferred to the US by the Drug Enforcement Administration.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

此次行动标志着玻利维亚与美国在毒品执法领域恢复合作，结束了近二十年的敌对状态。新总统罗德里戈·帕兹作为特朗普盟友，将打击毒品犯罪作为其执政优先事项，此举也反映了南美政治格局正在向右翼转变。 This arrest signals renewed Bolivia-US cooperation on drug enforcement after nearly two decades of hostility. It reflects a broader rightward political shift in South America, with President Paz prioritizing anti-narcotics efforts as part of his alliance with the Trump administration.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注南美政治动态与跨国执法合作趋势，可将其作为分析国际禁毒政策、地缘政治联盟变化的案例。对于从事合规、风险管理或国际业务的人员，需留意该区域执法环境变化带来的商业影响。 Monitor South American political dynamics and cross-border law enforcement cooperation as a case study for international drug policy and geopolitical realignment. For compliance, risk management, or international business professionals, track how shifting enforcement environments in the region may impact operations.

ST ST64UWB Cortex-M85 ultra-wideband SoC supports IEEE 802.15.4z and 802.15.4ab UWB standards, radar sensing

CNX Software

是什么 / What it is

意法半导体（STMicroelectronics）发布了 ST64UWB 系列 SoC，这是一款基于 Arm Cortex-M85 的超宽带（UWB）系统级芯片，采用 18nm FD-SOI 工艺制造，同时支持现行的 IEEE 802.15.4z 和即将推出的 IEEE 802.15.4ab UWB 标准。该系列包含三款产品：面向汽车入门的 A100、高端汽车的 A500（带雷达感知功能）以及面向工业/智能家居的 C100。
STMicroelectronics has released the ST64UWB series SoC, an Arm Cortex-M85-based ultra-wideband (UWB) system-on-chip manufactured on an 18nm FD-SOI process, supporting both current IEEE 802.15.4z and upcoming IEEE 802.15.4ab UWB standards. The family includes three variants: the A100 for automotive entry, the A500 for premium automotive (with radar sensing), and the C100 for industrial/smart home applications. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

UWB 技术正成为数字车钥匙、无感门禁和精准定位的核心基础设施，而 IEEE 802.15.4ab 新标准的引入将链路预算提升高达 18dB，使安全测距距离延长约 8 倍，同时 Kaiser 脉冲形状和 1.3GHz 带宽可将空间精度提升约两倍。这预示着 UWB 将从"精准定位"向"长距离雷达感知"演进，拓展儿童存在检测、脚踢传感器等汽车安全场景。
UWB technology is becoming core infrastructure for digital car keys, hands-free access, and precise positioning. The new IEEE 802.15.4ab standard increases link budget by up to 18 dB, extending secure ranging distance by roughly 8×, while Kaiser pulse shaping and 1.3 GHz bandwidth deliver approximately double the spatial accuracy. This signals UWB's evolution from "precise positioning" toward "long-range radar sensing," expanding into automotive safety scenarios like child presence detection and kick sensors. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

开发者可关注 ST64UWB-C100 用于工业资产追踪、智能家居设备精准定位或室内导航原型开发；汽车电子工程师可评估 A500 的雷达感知能力，实现无感进入与舱内生命检测的融合方案。建议跟踪 CCC/ICCE/Aliro 联盟的生态进展，提前布局 UWB + 蓝牙/NFC 的多模安全认证系统架构设计。
Developers can explore the ST64UWB-C100 for industrial asset tracking, smart home device localization, or indoor navigation prototypes; automotive engineers can evaluate the A500's radar sensing capabilities for integrated hands-free entry and in-cabin life detection solutions. It is recommended to monitor ecosystem developments from CCC/ICCE/Aliro alliances and proactively architect multi-mode secure authentication systems combining UWB with Bluetooth/NFC.

Japan taps oil reserves as Iran war spreads. Could it give China leverage?

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

本文讨论日本在中东冲突升级、霍尔木兹海峡关闭的背景下，单方面动用战略石油储备以稳定国内油价的决策，以及这一举动可能暴露其能源安全脆弱性并为中国带来潜在战略筹码的分析。
This article discusses Japan's unilateral decision to tap its strategic petroleum reserves to stabilize domestic fuel prices amid escalating Middle East conflict and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, alongside analysis that this move may expose Japan's energy security vulnerability and potentially give China strategic leverage.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

日本90%以上的石油依赖中东进口，使其在供应链中断时极易受冲击；此次独自行动而非等待国际能源署协调响应，反映出其对国内经济稳定的紧迫担忧，但也揭示了与盟友协调机制的局限性。
With over 90% of its oil imports coming from the Middle East, Japan is highly vulnerable to supply chain disruptions; its solo action rather than waiting for an IEA-coordinated response reflects urgent domestic economic concerns but also reveals limitations in alliance coordination mechanisms.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

可关注能源依赖型经济体的地缘政治风险对冲策略，研究战略储备释放机制与多边协调的时效性差异；对于投资或企业决策，需评估单一供应来源国家在危机中的政策反应模式及其对货币、财政可持续性的连锁影响。
One can study geopolitical risk hedging strategies for energy-dependent economies and examine timing differences between strategic reserve releases and multilateral coordination; for investment or corporate decisions, assess crisis policy response patterns of single-source-dependent nations and their cascading effects on currency and fiscal sustainability.

Iran lets 2 India-flagged gas tankers sail through Strait of Hormuz, insiders say

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

本文报道了伊朗在美以轰炸行动后封锁霍尔木兹海峡的背景下，罕见地允许两艘印度籍液化石油气运输船通过该海峡。印度此前为183名伊朗船员提供了安全庇护，并正在寻求能源运输豁免以缓解国内严重的天然气危机。
This article reports that Iran has made a rare exception to its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following US-Israel bombing campaigns, allowing two India-flagged LPG carriers to pass through. India, which previously provided safe harbour to 183 Iranian sailors, is seeking exemptions for energy transit to alleviate its worst gas crisis in decades.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这一事件体现了地缘政治中"人道主义换通行权"的务实外交模式，展示了印度在美伊冲突中保持战略自主的平衡术。霍尔木兹海峡承担全球约20%的石油和海运液化天然气供应，任何封锁例外都可能成为缓解全球能源危机的关键窗口。
This incident demonstrates a pragmatic "humanitarian-for-access" diplomatic model in geopolitics, showcasing India's strategic autonomy in balancing between US-Iran tensions. The Strait of Hormuz handles approximately 20% of global oil and seaborne LNG supplies, making any blockade exception a potential critical window for alleviating global energy crises.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注能源供应链中的地缘政治风险对冲策略，特别是多国冲突背景下的"中立国优势"和"人道主义筹码"运用。对于能源密集型行业，可建立类似印度-伊朗模式的多元供应协议，将非商业因素（如船员救助、港口合作）纳入供应链韧性设计。
Monitor geopolitical risk hedging strategies in energy supply chains, particularly the "neutral state advantage" and "humanitarian leverage" in multi-conflict contexts. For energy-intensive industries, consider establishing diversified supply agreements similar to the India-Iran model, incorporating non-commercial factors (crew assistance, port cooperation) into supply chain resilience design.

Singapore contests US claim of trade surplus amid excess capacity probe

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

美国贸易代表办公室（USTR）本周依据《1974年贸易法》第301条款，对包括新加坡在内的16个经济体发起调查，指控其存在结构性制造业产能过剩，并声称新加坡2024年对美贸易顺差达270亿美元。新加坡贸工部随即反驳，指出美国自身数据显示新加坡对美实际为贸易逆差约270亿美元，双方数据存在根本分歧。
The US Trade Representative's Office launched Section 301 investigations into 16 economies including Singapore, alleging structural manufacturing overcapacity and claiming Singapore had a US$27 billion trade surplus with the US in 2024. Singapore's Ministry of Trade and Industry immediately contested this, citing US Bureau of Economic Analysis data showing Singapore actually ran a US$27 billion trade deficit with the US—a fundamental discrepancy between the two sides' figures.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

此事件揭示了美国贸易政策中数据使用的高度选择性，以及将"产能过剩"作为贸易制裁工具的扩张趋势，可能开创以主观判断而非客观数据发起贸易调查的先例。新加坡作为高度开放的小型经济体被卷入调查，表明美国贸易保护主义的打击范围已超越传统大国竞争，对全球多边贸易体系构成系统性风险。
This case exposes the highly selective use of data in US trade policy and the expanding trend of using "excess capacity" as a tool for trade sanctions, potentially setting a precedent for launching investigations based on subjective judgments rather than objective data. Singapore's inclusion—as a highly open, small economy—signals that US trade protectionism has expanded beyond traditional great-power competition, posing systemic risks to the global multilateral trading system.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注跨国企业供应链布局时需重新评估"友岸外包"策略的政治风险，即使是与美国关系密切的合作伙伴也可能面临突发性贸易调查；在分析国际贸易争端时应交叉验证多方数据源，警惕官方叙事中的统计口径差异；跟踪美国USTR联邦公报及各国官方回应，建立针对301调查等贸易政策工具的预警监测机制。
When evaluating supply chain strategies for multinational enterprises, reassess the political risks of "friend-shoring" as even close US partners may face sudden trade investigations; when analyzing international trade disputes, cross-verify multiple data sources and remain alert to statistical discrepancies in official narratives; track USTR Federal Register notices and official government responses to establish early-warning mechanisms for trade policy tools such as Section 301 investigations.

Jump in illegal refuelling complaints as Hong Kong grapples with rising oil prices

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

香港因油价飙升导致非法加油活动激增，2025年1-2月消防处收到221宗相关投诉，较月均水平上升42%，检控数字更激增85%。非法经营者将车辆改装为流动加油点，分散经营以逃避执法。/ Hong Kong has seen a surge in illegal refuelling activities due to rising oil prices, with the Fire Services Department receiving 221 complaints in January-February 2025, up 42% from the monthly average, while prosecutions jumped 85%. Illegal operators have adapted by converting vehicles into mobile refuelling points and scattering operations to evade detection.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这反映了地缘政治冲突（如中东局势）对本地民生的直接冲击，同时暴露监管漏洞——流动化、分散化的非法经营模式增加了执法难度，对公共安全构成显著风险。政府正通过约谈燃料供应商和关注价格透明度来应对，显示这已上升至政策层面。/ This reflects the direct impact of geopolitical conflicts (e.g., Middle East tensions) on local livelihoods, while exposing regulatory gaps—mobile and scattered illegal operations increase enforcement difficulty and pose significant public safety risks. The government's engagement with fuel suppliers on pricing transparency signals policy-level attention.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

若从事能源、物流或公共政策领域，可研究油价波动与灰色经济活动的关联模型，或开发智能监测方案识别流动加油车辆；普通市民则应警惕非正规加油渠道的安全隐患，同时关注政府价格监管措施的后续效果。/ For energy, logistics or public policy professionals, consider researching correlation models between oil price volatility and grey-market activities, or developing smart monitoring solutions to detect mobile refuelling vehicles; general citizens should avoid unlicensed refuelling due to safety risks and monitor the effectiveness of government pricing oversight measures.

Running a PC off AA Cells With Buck Converters Really Boosts Performance

Hackaday

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章介绍了YouTube博主[ScuffedBits]进行的第二次实验：使用64节AA电池（碳性、碱性、镍氢三种类型）通过降压转换器为台式电脑供电。与第一次尝试相比，这次实验采用了更高电压的电池组配置（约25V直流），通过廉价的降压模块转换为12V直流，成功让一台基于Core i3 530的电脑运行了33分钟以上，甚至可以启动系统、运行游戏和基准测试。
This article describes a second experiment by YouTuber [ScuffedBits] using 64 AA batteries (carbon, alkaline, and NiMH types) with buck converters to power a desktop PC. Compared to the first attempt, this experiment used a higher voltage battery configuration (~25V DC), converted to 12V DC through a cheap buck regulator module, successfully running a Core i3 530-based computer for over 33 minutes, including system boot, gaming, and benchmark testing. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这个实验验证了高电压+降压转换器方案在低功率直流供电中的优势：通过提高电压降低电流，减少线路损耗和安全隐患，同时展示了镍氢电池在实际高放电场景下的优越性能。这也提醒我们，尽管锂电池技术不断进步，镍氢电池凭借良好的功率密度、安全性和环保特性，在特定应用场景中仍具竞争力， DIY电源设计中的"复古"技术选择往往有其工程合理性。
This experiment validates the advantages of high-voltage + buck converter solutions for low-power DC applications: higher voltage reduces current, minimizing line losses and safety risks, while demonstrating NiMH batteries' superior performance in high-discharge scenarios. It also reminds us that despite lithium-ion advances, NiMH batteries remain competitive in specific applications due to good power density, safety, and environmental friendliness—"retro" technical choices in DIY power design often have solid engineering rationale. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

对于需要构建便携或备用直流电源的场景，可采用"电池组串联升压+降压稳压"的架构，优先选择镍氢等可充电化学体系以降低长期成本。在电子DIY项目中，可利用常见的降压模块（如LM2596、XL4015等）将不稳定的电池电压转换为稳定的12V/5V输出，同时注意根据负载功率计算合适的电池串联数量，确保输入电压始终高于目标输出电压以维持转换效率。
For portable or backup DC power needs, consider a "battery series-boost + buck regulation" architecture, prioritizing rechargeable chemistries like NiMH for long-term cost savings. In electronics DIY projects, common buck modules (LM2596, XL4015, etc.) can convert unstable battery voltage to stable 12V/5V output—calculate appropriate series cell count based on load power to ensure input voltage remains above target output for conversion efficiency.

How an iceberg’s ‘final dance’ tells a story about our past and future

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章讲述了南极巨型冰山A23a的消亡历程——这座1986年从菲尔希纳冰架脱落、面积相当于香港与深圳之和的"超级冰山"，在沉睡30年后被卷入洋流，最终在向南乔治亚岛漂移的过程中逐渐融化消失。它的"最后一舞"成为气候变化背景下冰川命运的缩影。
This article narrates the demise of Antarctic megaberg A23a—a "super iceberg" that calved from the Filchner Ice Shelf in 1986 (covering an area equivalent to Hong Kong plus Shenzhen), lay dormant for 30 years, then got caught in ocean currents and gradually melted away while drifting toward South Georgia Island. Its "final dance" serves as a microcosm of glacial fate amid climate change. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

A23a的消亡并非孤立事件，而是南极冰架加速崩解的警示信号——科学家指出其"变得相当稀烂，活不了多久"的状态反映了海洋升温对极地冰体的系统性侵蚀。这种"无声的消亡"揭示了人类对生物圈变化的忽视，以及冰川融化对海平面上升和全球气候系统的深远影响。
A23a's disappearance is not an isolated event but a warning signal of accelerating Antarctic ice shelf collapse—scientists note its "getting pretty mushy and wasn't going to live long" condition reflects systematic erosion of polar ice by ocean warming. This "silent fate" exposes humanity's neglect of biosphere changes and the profound implications of glacial melt for sea-level rise and global climate systems. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

可将此案例用于气候传播：用具体可感的"冰山生命周期"叙事替代抽象数据，增强公众对极地变化的认知；在科研或教育场景中，追踪类似A23a的冰山轨迹数据（如英国南极调查局的监测资料）分析洋流与温度关联；个人层面则可关注极地科考动态，支持基于卫星遥感的冰川监测公民科学项目。
This case can be leveraged for climate communication: replacing abstract data with tangible "iceberg life cycle" narratives to enhance public understanding of polar changes; in research or education, tracking trajectory data of similar icebergs (e.g., from British Antarctic Survey) to analyze ocean current-temperature correlations; personally, following polar research updates and supporting citizen science projects based on satellite remote sensing for glacial monitoring.

2 anti-China activists have case to answer in subversion trial, court rules

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

香港高等法院裁定，两名前"香港支联会"领袖李卓人和邹幸彤须就煽动颠覆国家政权罪继续受审。法官认为控方证据显示，两人在2020年7月至2021年9月组织解散期间，持续宣扬结束"一党专政"的目标，可能构成煽动他人推翻中国共产党领导的犯罪行为。
Hong Kong's High Court has ruled that two former leaders of the Hong Kong Alliance in Support of Patriotic Democratic Movements of China, Lee Cheuk-yan and Chow Hang-tung, must stand trial for allegedly inciting subversion. The judges found that prosecution evidence suggested the activists, aged 69 and 41 respectively, committed the offence by persistently promoting an end to "one-party dictatorship" from July 2020 until the organization's dissolution in September 2021.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

此案是香港《国安法》实施后首宗涉及非暴力言论的颠覆国家政权案，标志着司法对"煽动"定义的扩展。法官虽驳回控方"中共领导不可变更"的宪法解释，但仍认定宣扬政治口号可构成犯罪，反映了香港言论自由与国家安全法律之间的张力持续收紧。
This case represents the first subversion trial under Hong Kong's National Security Law involving non-violent speech, signaling an expanded judicial interpretation of "incitement." While the judges rejected the prosecution's constitutional argument that CCP leadership is unchangeable, they still ruled that promoting political slogans could constitute a crime—reflecting the ongoing tightening balance between free expression and national security legislation in Hong Kong.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注此案的后续判决对理解香港《国安法》的司法实践边界具有参考价值；研究法官对宪法解释与犯罪构成要件的区分逻辑，可分析普通法传统与国家安全法的互动模式。对于涉及跨境合规、媒体传播或NGO运营的专业人士，需持续追踪此类判例对风险框架的影响。
Following this case's final verdict offers reference value for understanding the judicial boundaries of Hong Kong's National Security Law; studying the judges' distinction between constitutional interpretation and criminal elements can help analyze the interaction between common law tradition and national security legislation. For professionals in cross-border compliance, media communications, or NGO operations, tracking such precedents remains essential for updating risk frameworks.

How Iran turned Strait of Hormuz into potent weapon against US bombardment

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章分析了伊朗如何将霍尔木兹海峡这一全球能源运输咽喉要道转化为对抗美国军事优势的"不对称武器"——通过威胁或实际阻断石油运输来抵消敌方的军事 superiority，而非直接进行常规战争。文章指出，自2月28日战争爆发以来，伊朗已使该海峡的油轮通行量下降了97%。
This article analyzes how Iran has transformed the Strait of Hormuz—a critical global energy transportation chokepoint—into an "asymmetric weapon" against US military superiority. Rather than engaging in conventional warfare, Iran threatens or actually blocks oil shipments to offset its enemies' military advantages. The article notes that since the war began on February 28, Iran has reduced tanker traffic through the strait by 97%.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这一策略揭示了现代冲突中"经济基础设施武器化"的新趋势：地理咽喉要道与全球供应链的脆弱性成为弱势方对抗强权的筹码，能源安全与地缘政治深度绑定。同时，低成本无人机和导弹技术使中小国家获得了前所未有的区域拒止能力，改变了传统海权博弈的规则。
This strategy reveals a new trend in modern conflict—the "weaponization of economic infrastructure," where geographic chokepoints and global supply chain vulnerabilities become leverage for weaker parties against stronger powers, deeply intertwining energy security with geopolitics. Meanwhile, low-cost drones and missile technology have given smaller nations unprecedented area-denial capabilities, altering the rules of traditional maritime power competition.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

对于技术从业者，可研究关键基础设施的韧性设计与供应链冗余方案；对于政策分析者，需关注"灰色地带"战术与混合战争理论的发展；对于投资者，应评估地缘政治风险对大宗商品定价模型的重构需求，并将海峡通行数据纳入能源市场监测指标体系。
For technology professionals: research resilience design for critical infrastructure and supply chain redundancy solutions. For policy analysts: monitor developments in "gray zone" tactics and hybrid warfare theory. For investors: assess how geopolitical risk is restructuring commodity pricing models, and incorporate strait transit data into energy market monitoring frameworks.

In a first for China, Neuracle’s implantable brain-computer interface wins approval

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

中国初创公司Neuracle（宁矩科技）的植入式脑机接口（BCI）手运动功能系统获得国家药监局批准，成为全球首款可作为商业产品销售并用于患者的侵入式BCI设备。该系统由清华大学生物医学工程博士徐宏来于2011年创立的公司开发，是一种硬币大小的无线装置，放置于大脑表面而非穿透脑组织，用于读取神经信号并转化为手部动作。
Neuracle上月已启动科创板IPO进程，与中信证券签署辅导协议。 Neuracle, a Chinese BCI startup founded by Tsinghua PhD Xu Honglai in 2011, received approval from China's National Medical Products Administration for its implantable BCI hand motor function system—marking the world's first commercial invasive BCI product for patient use. The coin-sized wireless device sits on the brain's surface without penetrating tissue, reading neural signals to translate them into hand movements. The company has also initiated its IPO process on Shanghai's Star Market with Citic Securities. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

此次批准标志着中国在侵入式脑机接口商业化领域首次领先全球，打破了Neuralink等美国公司的技术垄断预期，同时反映了中国监管机构对前沿医疗技术的积极支持态度。随着监管放开和资本涌入，中国BCI初创企业正加速发展，相关概念股已出现显著上涨，预示着该产业可能复制新能源、电动车等领域的国产替代路径。这也为全球BCI行业竞争格局带来重大变数，技术商业化速度或成为关键分水岭。
This approval marks China's first global lead in commercializing invasive BCIs, disrupting expectations of American dominance by Neuralink and demonstrating proactive regulatory support for cutting-edge medical technology. With regulatory backing and capital inflows, Chinese BCI startups are accelerating—evidenced by surging stock prices of related companies—potentially replicating the domestic substitution path seen in EVs and renewable energy. This significantly reshapes global BCI competition, making commercialization speed a critical differentiator. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

对于投资者，可关注科创板BCI概念股及Neuracle IPO进展，评估国产替代主题下的早期布局机会；对于医疗/科技从业者，可研究其"非穿透性"技术路径与Neuralink全侵入方案的差异，探索临床应用的合作或差异化创新空间；对于技术观察者，建议持续跟踪中国NMPA与FDA在BCI审批节奏上的对比，这将成为判断全球产业格局演变的重要风向标。
For investors: monitor Star Market BCI stocks and Neuracle's IPO progress for early positioning in domestic substitution themes. For medical/tech professionals: study its "non-penetrating" approach versus Neuralink's fully invasive design to identify collaboration or differentiated innovation opportunities. For technology observers: track NMPA-FDA approval pace comparisons as a key indicator for evolving global industry dynamics.

Donald Liao, architect who shaped Hong Kong’s housing landscape, dies at 96

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

本文报道了香港最具影响力的政府建筑师之一、公营房屋先驱廖本怀（Donald Liao Poon-huai）于96岁逝世的消息。他是香港首位房屋署署长（1973-1980），也是首位在英治时期担任政务司的华人官员（1985-1989），主导设计了马头围、华富等早期标志性公共屋邨，并开创了居者有其屋计划。
This article reports the death of Donald Liao Poon-huai, one of Hong Kong's most influential government architects and public housing visionaries, at age 96. He served as Hong Kong's first director of housing (1973-1980) and became the first Chinese official under British rule to serve as secretary for district administration (1985-1989), leading the design of landmark early housing estates including Ma Tau Wai and Wah Fu, and pioneering the Home Ownership Scheme.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

廖本怀的职业生涯横跨香港公共房屋发展的关键时期，其设计理念和政策创新深刻影响了数百万香港市民的居住条件，塑造了现代香港的城市面貌。作为首位担任高级政务职位的华人，他也象征着殖民地时期香港公务员体系中华人地位的提升，具有重要的历史和社会意义。
Liao's career spanned a critical period in Hong Kong's public housing development, and his design philosophy and policy innovations profoundly affected living conditions for millions of Hong Kong residents, shaping the modern urban landscape of the city. As the first Chinese person to hold senior administrative positions, he also symbolized the rising status of Chinese officials in Hong Kong's colonial civil service, carrying significant historical and social meaning.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

城市规划与建筑专业人士可研究廖本怀的公共房屋设计案例，借鉴其平衡密度、社区配套与人文关怀的经验，应用于当代住房挑战。政策研究者则可分析居者有其屋计划的历史演变，为当前住房可负担性问题提供政策参考。此外，他的职业轨迹也可作为公共部门领导力与跨文化治理研究的案例。
Urban planning and architecture professionals can study Liao's public housing design cases, drawing lessons from his experience in balancing density, community amenities, and humanistic care for contemporary housing challenges. Policy researchers may analyze the historical evolution of the Home Ownership Scheme to inform current housing affordability issues. Additionally, his career trajectory can serve as a case study for public sector leadership and cross-cultural governance research.

New Research Accurately Assesses Coffee Origins Using Gas Chromatography & AI

Sprudge

是什么 / What it is

这是一项结合气相色谱技术与人工智能（计算机视觉）的咖啡研究，通过分析咖啡中的挥发性化合物来准确判断咖啡豆的产地来源。研究人员为巴西、哥伦比亚、埃塞俄比亚、危地马拉和印度五个产地的咖啡创建了"非靶向化学指纹"图谱，建立了可识别产地的复合模板。
This is a coffee research study combining gas chromatography with artificial intelligence (computer vision) to accurately determine coffee origins by analyzing volatile compounds. Researchers created "untargeted chemical fingerprints" for coffees from five origins—Brazil, Colombia, Ethiopia, Guatemala, and India—establishing composite templates capable of identifying geographic sources. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这项技术为咖啡行业提供了更客观的质量评估工具，减少传统杯测中主观性和人为误差的影响，同时有助于验证产地真实性，打击虚假标注。尽管目前样本范围有限，未涵盖品种和产后处理等变量，但它标志着咖啡品质评估从依赖感官向数据驱动的重要转变。
This technology offers the coffee industry a more objective quality assessment tool, reducing subjectivity and human error in traditional cupping while helping verify origin authenticity and combat mislabeling. Though currently limited in scope—excluding variables like variety and post-harvest processing—it represents a significant shift from sensory-dependent to data-driven coffee quality evaluation. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

咖啡从业者可关注此技术的商业化进展，考虑将其作为杯测的补充工具用于品控和产地验证；研究者或可探索将类似方法应用于其他农产品溯源；消费者则可借此了解咖啡风味的科学基础，更理性地选择符合偏好的产地咖啡。
Coffee professionals can monitor this technology's commercialization and consider adopting it as a supplementary tool for quality control and origin verification; researchers might explore applying similar methods to other agricultural products' traceability; consumers can use this to understand the scientific basis of coffee flavor and make more informed origin-based selections.

Trump and Netanyahu’s Iran quagmire is wrecking the global economy

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

本文分析了特朗普与内塔尼亚胡政府对伊朗采取的军事行动如何演变为全球经济危机。文章指出，中东地区的冲突正在通过能源市场产生全球性连锁反应，特别是霍尔木兹海峡的潜在封锁已造成史上最大规模的石油供应冲击，其影响远超1973年和1979年的石油危机。
This article analyzes how the military actions taken by the Trump and Netanyahu administrations against Iran have escalated into a global economic crisis. It highlights that the Middle East conflict is generating worldwide ripple effects through energy markets, with a potential Iranian blockade of the Hormuz Strait creating the largest oil supply shock in history—three to four times greater than the 1973 and 1979 oil crises. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这场冲突揭示了地缘政治决策与全球经济稳定之间的致命脱节。当油价逼近150美元/桶时，通胀压力、供应链中断和能源安全风险将波及每一个国家，无论其是否直接参与冲突。更重要的是，它暴露了"以武力遏制威胁"这一战略思维的反噬效应——美国长期试图避免的霍尔木兹海峡封锁，恰恰因对伊战争而成为现实。
This conflict reveals the fatal disconnect between geopolitical decisions and global economic stability. As oil prices approach $150 per barrel, inflationary pressures, supply chain disruptions, and energy security risks will cascade to every nation regardless of direct involvement. More critically, it exposes the blowback effect of "force-based threat containment" strategies—the very Hormuz Strait blockade the US long sought to avoid has materialized precisely because of the war against Iran. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

个人与机构应重新评估能源投资组合的韧性，考虑增加对可再生能源和能源效率技术的配置以对冲化石燃料价格波动。企业决策者需将地缘政治风险纳入供应链规划，建立能源来源多元化机制。政策研究者则可深入分析"自我正义叙事"如何导致战略误判，为未来冲突预防提供认知框架。
Individuals and institutions should reassess portfolio resilience against energy volatility, increasing allocation to renewables and efficiency technologies to hedge fossil fuel price swings. Corporate decision-makers must integrate geopolitical risk into supply chain planning, diversifying energy sourcing mechanisms. Policy researchers can analyze how "narratives of self-righteousness" lead to strategic miscalculation, developing cognitive frameworks for future conflict prevention.

OS/2 Never Went Away. Its Successor Has Received An Update

Hackaday

是什么 / What it is

ArcaOS 是 IBM 经典操作系统 OS/2 的商业继承者，刚刚发布了 5.1.2 版本更新，新增了对现代 UEFI 系统的支持。这是一个 32 位的商业操作系统，主打隐私保护和用户自由，与当今主流操作系统的商业模式形成鲜明对比。
ArcaOS is the commercial successor to IBM's classic OS/2 operating system, which just received version 5.1.2 update adding support for modern UEFI systems. It's a 32-bit commercial OS that emphasizes privacy protection and user freedom, standing in stark contrast to the business models of today's mainstream operating systems. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

在主流操作系统日益将"播放按钮变成付费按钮"、并广泛收集用户数据的背景下，ArcaOS 提供了一种不监控用户、不报告在线活动的替代选择。这次更新让这款诞生于 1990 年代的操作系统遗产在现代硬件上得以延续，展示了小众技术生态的顽强生命力。
In an era where mainstream OS increasingly turns "the Play button into the Pay button" and extensively collects user data, ArcaOS offers an alternative that doesn't spy on users or report online activities. This update allows this 1990s operating system legacy to continue on modern hardware, demonstrating the resilience of niche technology ecosystems. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

对于关注隐私的老硬件爱好者或特定工业应用场景，可以考虑测试 ArcaOS 作为轻量级稳定系统；开发者可研究其 32 位架构和兼容性设计，了解操作系统演进的历史经验；同时这也提醒我们在评估技术方案时，不应忽视那些看似"过时"但仍在维护的替代选项。
For privacy-conscious vintage hardware enthusiasts or specific industrial use cases, consider testing ArcaOS as a lightweight stable system; developers can study its 32-bit architecture and compatibility design to learn from historical OS evolution; this also reminds us not to overlook "legacy" but actively maintained alternatives when evaluating technology solutions.

Strait of Hormuz transiting ships flash ‘China owner’ signals to evade Iran blockade

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章报道了霍尔木兹海峡过境船舶通过AIS信号伪造"中国船东/船员/货物"身份以规避伊朗封锁的现象。至少11艘悬挂巴拿马、马绍尔群岛、科威特和几内亚国旗的商船在周五下午更改了船舶自动识别系统（AIS）广播信息，宣称与中国有关联。
This article reports on a phenomenon where transiting vessels in the Strait of Hormuz are falsifying AIS signals to claim "Chinese owner/crew/cargo" identities to evade Iranian blockades. At least 11 commercial ships flying flags of Panama, the Marshall Islands, Kuwait, and Guinea altered their Automatic Identification System (AIS) broadcasts on Friday afternoon to declare Chinese affiliations.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这一现象揭示了全球航运业在地缘政治冲突中的脆弱性，以及"中国中立"身份已成为一种可交易的战略资产。随着中东冲突升级，这种"外交防弹"策略正演变为系统性的风险规避机制，同时也暴露出国际航运标识制度的信任危机。
This phenomenon reveals the vulnerability of global shipping amid geopolitical conflicts, and how "Chinese neutrality" has become a tradable strategic asset. As Middle East conflicts escalate, this "diplomatic bulletproofing" strategy is evolving into a systematic risk-mitigation mechanism, while also exposing a crisis of trust in international shipping identification systems.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

航运企业可研究建立多层级身份验证与危机响应预案，避免单一国家标签依赖；政策制定者需关注AIS数据可信度下降对海上安全治理的挑战；投资者应重新评估地缘政治风险溢价在航运保险和物流定价中的权重。
Shipping companies can research multi-tier identity verification and crisis response protocols to avoid over-reliance on single-country labels; policymakers need to address the challenges posed by declining AIS data credibility to maritime security governance; investors should reassess the weight of geopolitical risk premiums in shipping insurance and logistics pricing.

How Middle East conflict and soaring oil prices will affect Angola’s Chinese debt deals

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章探讨了中东冲突导致油价飙升如何影响安哥拉与中国的债务协议。安哥拉与中国贷款方（如国家开发银行）签订的债务重组协议中包含一项特殊条款：当油价超过每桶60美元时，额外收入将存入储备账户用于偿还债务。
This article examines how Middle East conflicts and soaring oil prices are affecting Angola's debt agreements with Chinese lenders. Angola's debt-reprofiling deal with Chinese lenders like China Development Bank includes a special clause: when oil prices exceed US$60 per barrel, extra revenue is placed into a reserve account for debt repayments.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这一机制揭示了资源型国家债务协议中"商品挂钩条款"的战略价值——既能保障债权人利益，又能为债务国创造融资灵活性。对于安哥拉而言，当前油价突破100美元意味着可加速偿还对华债务并释放资金用于新基建项目（如洛比托炼油厂），同时也反映了全球能源地缘政治波动如何重塑南南合作金融安排。
This mechanism reveals the strategic value of "commodity-linked clauses" in resource-rich nations' debt agreements—protecting creditors' interests while creating financing flexibility for debtor countries. For Angola, oil prices surpassing US$100 mean accelerated repayment of Chinese debt and freed-up funds for new infrastructure projects like the Lobito refinery, while also reflecting how global energy geopolitical volatility reshapes South-South financial cooperation arrangements.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

若从事国际发展金融或能源投资，可研究类似"债务-商品挂钩"条款的设计逻辑，评估其在其他资源出口国（如赞比亚、刚果）的适用性；若关注新兴市场风险，可建立油价波动与非洲国家债务可持续性的关联分析框架；若参与基建出海项目，可追踪安哥拉储备账户充盈后可能释放的招标机会，特别是在能源转型相关领域。
If working in international development finance or energy investment, study the design logic of similar "debt-commodity-linked" clauses and assess their applicability to other resource-exporting countries like Zambia or Congo; if monitoring emerging market risks, build analytical frameworks connecting oil price volatility to African debt sustainability; if involved in infrastructure export projects, track tender opportunities that may emerge once Angola's reserve accounts are replenished, particularly in energy transition-related sectors.

Beyond Semantic Similarity: Introducing NVIDIA NeMo Retriever’s Generalizable Agentic Retrieval Pipeline

Hugging Face Blog

是什么 / What it is

NVIDIA NeMo Retriever 团队开发了一种全新的**代理式检索管道（Agentic Retrieval Pipeline）**，采用 ReACT 架构实现 LLM 与检索器之间的主动迭代循环。该管道通过动态调整搜索策略、生成优化查询、持续改写和分解复杂问题，在 ViDoRe v3 视觉文档检索基准测试中排名第一，同时在推理密集型 BRIGHT 基准测试中排名第二。
The NVIDIA NeMo Retriever team developed a novel **agentic retrieval pipeline** using ReACT architecture that creates an active, iterative loop between LLM and retriever. It dynamically adjusts search strategies, generates optimized queries, persistently rephrases, and decomposes complex problems—achieving #1 on ViDoRe v3 visual document retrieval benchmark and #2 on the reasoning-intensive BRIGHT benchmark. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

传统基于语义相似度的密集检索已无法满足复杂企业场景需求，而现有解决方案往往过度专业化、难以跨域泛化。该管道的核心价值在于**通用性（generalizability）**：同一架构无需修改即可适配视觉布局解析、多步逻辑推理等截然不同的任务，解决了企业 AI 应用中数据多样、任务多变的现实挑战。
Traditional dense retrieval based on semantic similarity can no longer meet complex enterprise needs, while existing solutions are often over-specialized and fail to generalize across domains. The core value of this pipeline lies in **generalizability**: the same architecture adapts to vastly different tasks—from visual layout parsing to multi-step logical reasoning—without architectural changes, addressing the real-world challenge of diverse data and varied tasks in enterprise AI applications. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

1. **架构参考**：在企业 RAG 系统中引入 ReACT 式的代理循环，用 LLM 主动规划检索策略而非单次查询，并设计工具调用（think/retrieve/final_results）规范交互流程。 2. **工程优化**：用进程内单例模式替代 MCP 等跨进程通信方案，消除网络序列化开销，提升 GPU 利用率和实验迭代速度。 3. **模型选型权衡**：根据延迟-质量需求选择配置——闭源前沿模型（如 Opus 4.5）精度更高但成本更大，开源模型（如 gpt-oss-120b）可大幅降低延迟和 token 消耗，适合生产规模化部署。 1. **Architectural reference**: Introduce ReACT-style agent loops in enterprise RAG systems, using LLM to actively plan retrieval strategies rather than single-shot queries, with tool calls (think/retrieve/final_results) to standardize interaction flows. 2. **Engineering optimization**: Replace cross-process communication like MCP with in-process singleton patterns to eliminate network serialization overhead and improve GPU utilization and experiment velocity. 3. **Model selection trade-offs**: Choose configurations based on latency-quality requirements—frontier closed models (e.g., Opus 4.5) offer higher accuracy at greater cost, while open models (e.g., gpt-oss-120b) significantly reduce latency and token consumption for production-scale deployment.

No More Paperweight: This Vintage Brick Phone Is Back Online

Hackaday

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章介绍了技术爱好者 Alan Boris 将一台 1990 年代的摩托罗拉 DynaTAC 8000 Classic 2 "大哥大" 手机改造为现代功能机的项目。他通过嵌入 Raspberry Pi Pico 2、小型 LCD 屏幕和 BM10 微型手机模块，让这台已淘汰的 1G 网络设备重新接入现代蜂窝网络。
This article describes a project by tech enthusiast Alan Boris who retrofitted a 1990s Motorola DynaTAC 8000 Classic 2 "brick phone" into a modern functional device. By embedding a Raspberry Pi Pico 2, a small LCD screen, and a BM10 mini cellphone module, he brought this obsolete 1G network device back onto modern cellular networks.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这个项目展示了复古硬件改造的技术可能性，将电子垃圾转化为可用设备，体现了可持续技术和创客文化的价值。同时，它也反映了人们对经典工业设计的情怀，以及通过现代嵌入式技术（如 Raspberry Pi Pico）实现跨代技术融合的创造力。
This project demonstrates the technical possibilities of retro hardware modification, transforming e-waste into functional devices while embodying the values of sustainable technology and maker culture. It also reflects nostalgia for classic industrial design and the creative potential of bridging generational technologies through modern embedded systems like the Raspberry Pi Pico.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

可以借鉴这种"外壳复古、内核现代"的改造思路，将旧电子设备（如老式收音机、打字机）与现代微控制器结合，制作兼具美学与功能的创意作品。具体可学习使用 perfboard 和触觉开关实现原始按键映射，以及通过 I2C 多路复用器（如 ADG729）控制外设的方法。
One can adopt this "retro shell, modern core" approach to combine vintage electronics (such as old radios or typewriters) with modern microcontrollers, creating aesthetic yet functional projects. Specifically, learn to use perfboard and tactile switches for original keypad mapping, and employ I2C multiplexers like ADG729 for peripheral control.

Cuba confirms talks with US as island gasps under Trump’s energy blockade

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔首次证实，古巴与美国近期举行了对话，旨在通过谈判解决双边分歧。这一披露发生在古巴因美国能源封锁而面临严重电力危机的背景下——过去三个月没有石油运抵，上周更发生大规模停电，影响数百万民众。
Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel confirmed for the first time that his government has held recent talks with the US aimed at resolving bilateral differences through dialogue. This disclosure comes as Cuba faces a severe energy crisis under US blockade—no petroleum shipments have arrived in three months, and a massive blackout last week left millions without power.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

此事标志着冷战后美古关系可能出现微妙转机，尽管特朗普政府维持强硬制裁政策。能源封锁已造成人道主义后果：通讯、教育、交通中断，数万例手术被迫推迟，显示经济制裁对平民生活的直接影响。同时，迪亚斯-卡内尔称"国际因素"促成对话，暗示多边压力或第三方斡旋可能正在改变博弈格局。
This signals a potential subtle shift in US-Cuba relations despite the Trump administration's hardline sanctions. The energy blockade has caused clear humanitarian consequences—disrupted communications, education, transport, and tens of thousands of postponed surgeries—demonstrating how economic sanctions directly impact civilian life. Meanwhile, Díaz-Canel's reference to "international factors" suggests multilateral pressure or third-party mediation may be altering the diplomatic calculus.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注跨国能源制裁与民生关联的案例分析框架，可用于理解地缘政治中的"人道主义困境"叙事策略。追踪"国际因素"的具体指向（如联合国投票、拉美国家联盟施压、或欧洲调解），以判断外交突破的真实驱动力。若从事能源或医疗供应链领域，可评估制裁环境下备用方案（如可再生能源、区域医疗互助机制）的可行性。
Apply this as a case study for analyzing how energy sanctions intersect with civilian livelihoods, useful for understanding "humanitarian dilemma" narratives in geopolitics. Track what specific "international factors" emerge—UN votes, Latin American diplomatic pressure, or European mediation—to assess the true drivers of any diplomatic breakthrough. For those in energy or healthcare supply chains, evaluate contingency options like renewable transitions or regional medical mutual aid under sanctions environments.

UK says Russia, Iran trying to ‘hijack global economy’ amid Hormuz blockade

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

英国外交大臣伊薇特·库珀指控俄罗斯和伊朗试图通过封锁霍尔木兹海峡这一全球关键石油运输通道来"劫持全球经济"。伊朗新最高领袖誓言继续袭击航运，以报复美以对其国家的持续打击，导致油价飙升至每桶约100美元。
UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper has accused Russia and Iran of attempting to "hijack the global economy" by blockading the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global oil shipping route. Iran's new supreme leader has vowed to continue attacking shipping in retaliation for ongoing US-Israeli strikes, causing oil prices to surge to around US$100 per barrel.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

霍尔木兹海峡承载着全球约五分之一的海运石油贸易，任何长期封锁都可能引发能源危机和全球性通胀。库珀的表态揭示了俄伊两国在能源地缘政治中的协同策略——通过制造供应恐慌抬高油价，既缓解自身制裁压力，又削弱西方经济稳定。
The Strait of Hormuz carries about one-fifth of global seaborne oil trade, and any prolonged blockade could trigger an energy crisis and global inflation. Cooper's statement reveals a coordinated Russia-Iran strategy in energy geopolitics—creating supply panic to drive up oil prices, thereby easing their own sanctions pressures while undermining Western economic stability.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注能源供应链多元化投资（如可再生能源、战略石油储备），对冲地缘政治风险；追踪俄伊技术合作动态（如无人机、导弹技术），评估网络安全威胁升级；企业应制定霍尔木兹海峡中断的应急预案，包括替代航线和供应商弹性布局。
Consider diversifying energy supply chain investments (renewables, strategic petroleum reserves) to hedge geopolitical risks; monitor Russia-Iran technology cooperation developments (drones, missile tech) to assess escalating cyber threats; businesses should develop contingency plans for Hormuz Strait disruptions, including alternative shipping routes and supplier resilience arrangements.

JPMorgan signs up as anchor tenant for SHKP’s West Kowloon office development

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

摩根大通（JPMorgan Chase）已签约成为新鸿基地产（SHKP）西九龙"艺方广场"（Artist Square Towers）办公项目的 anchor tenant（主力租户），将租用约25万平方英尺办公空间，租期10年，预计2028年下半年迁入。该项目位于香港西九龙文化区，总楼面面积约70万平方英尺，预计2027年竣工。
JPMorgan Chase has signed on as the anchor tenant for Sun Hung Kai Properties' (SHKP) Artist Square Towers (AST) office development in Hong Kong's West Kowloon district, committing to lease approximately 250,000 sq ft for 10 years with a planned move in the second half of 2028. The 700,000 sq ft mixed-use project, located in Hong Kong's main cultural hub, is targeted for completion in 2027. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这笔交易标志着国际金融机构对香港作为国际金融中心地位的持续信心，同时印证了西九龙作为"中环2.0"（Central 2.0）的崛起——从传统文化区转型为新兴商业枢纽。此举也可能引发其他跨国企业的跟随效应，加速香港商业格局从单一核心（中环）向多中心发展的演变。
This deal signals continued international confidence in Hong Kong as a premier financial centre while validating West Kowloon's emergence as "Central 2.0"—transforming from a cultural district into a new commercial hub. It may also trigger a follow-the-leader effect among other multinationals, accelerating Hong Kong's evolution from a single-core business district (Central) to a multi-centre commercial landscape. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

若从事商业地产或企业选址，可关注西九龙等新兴商务区的早期入驻机会与租金优势；若关注香港金融市场，可追踪此类标志性交易对区域写字楼供需及资产估值的影响；对于企业管理者，可借鉴摩根大通"保留中环+拓展新址"的双枢纽策略，平衡核心商务形象与员工体验升级。
For commercial real estate or corporate site selection professionals: monitor early-entry opportunities and rental advantages in emerging business districts like West Kowloon. For Hong Kong financial market observers: track how such landmark deals affect regional office supply-demand dynamics and asset valuations. For corporate executives: consider adopting JPMorgan's dual-hub strategy—retaining a Central presence while expanding to new locations—to balance core business prestige with enhanced employee experience.

Hong Kong MTR Corp pay rise below expectations: union

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

香港铁路有限公司（MTR Corp）宣布2026-27财年非管理层员工加薪幅度为1.6%至3.84%，低于去年1.8%至5.4%的调整幅度，同时员工将获得1.4至2.07个月的一次性绩效奖金。工会对此表示失望，认为加薪幅度低于预期。
Hong Kong's MTR Corporation announced pay increases of 1.6% to 3.84% for non-managerial staff for the 2026-27 financial year, down from last year's range of 1.8% to 5.4%, alongside one-off performance bonuses of 1.4 to 2.07 months' salary. Trade unions expressed disappointment, stating the raises fell below expectations.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这一加薪幅度反映了香港当前经济环境下企业薪酬增长放缓的趋势，尽管MTR录得146亿港元净利润，但薪酬调整趋于保守，可能预示本地就业市场薪资压力增大。同时，工会与企业在薪酬预期上的分歧也凸显了劳资关系中的张力。
The modest pay adjustments reflect a broader trend of slowing salary growth in Hong Kong's current economic climate, with MTR taking a conservative approach despite reporting HK$14.6 billion in net profit—potentially signaling increased wage pressure in the local job market. The gap between union expectations and corporate decisions also highlights ongoing tensions in labor relations.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

企业管理者可参考MTR的薪酬机制设计，平衡公司绩效、市场状况与员工贡献；求职者或在职员工应关注行业薪酬趋势，合理调整薪资预期；工会或HR专业人士可研究此类案例，优化集体谈判策略与沟通机制。
Corporate managers can study MTR's pay review mechanism as a reference for balancing company performance, market conditions, and employee contributions. Job seekers and employees should monitor industry salary trends to adjust expectations accordingly, while unions and HR professionals can analyze such cases to refine collective bargaining strategies and communication frameworks.

Deadly strike on Iranian primary school raises questions about AI, accountability

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章报道了美军在对伊朗军事行动中使用 Palantir 的 Maven 智能系统（整合了 Anthropic 的 Claude 等 AI 模型）处理情报数据，随后一所伊朗小学遭到致命打击的事件，引发了对 AI 在军事应用中责任归属问题的讨论。
The article reports on the US military's use of Palantir's Maven Smart System, which incorporates AI models like Anthropic's Claude, to process intelligence for operations against Iran, followed by a deadly strike on an Iranian primary school, raising questions about accountability in AI-enabled military applications.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这一事件凸显了 AI 在军事决策中的关键张力：尽管 AI 能高效处理海量数据，但最终打击决策仍由人类做出，系统故障或误判时的责任归属变得复杂模糊。随着 AI 越来越多地融入国防和情报领域，如何建立明确的人机责任边界已成为紧迫的伦理与治理挑战。
This case highlights the critical tension in military AI: while AI efficiently processes massive data, final strike decisions remain human-made, making accountability complex when systems fail or misjudge. As AI increasingly integrates into defense and intelligence, establishing clear human-machine responsibility boundaries has become an urgent ethical and governance challenge.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

技术从业者应推动"人在回路"（human-in-the-loop）设计原则，确保关键决策节点保留人类判断，并建立可审计的决策追踪机制；组织可借鉴此类案例，在部署 AI 系统前制定明确的责任矩阵和失效应急预案。
Technology practitioners should advocate for "human-in-the-loop" design principles, ensuring human judgment at critical decision points with auditable decision trails; organizations can draw lessons from such cases to establish clear accountability matrices and failure contingency plans before deploying AI systems.

Funding cuts trigger calls for help on jobs from Hong Kong’s physiotherapists

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

香港物理治疗协会向政府发出警告，指出尽管政府持续资助物理治疗师培训，但社会福利机构的资金削减已导致招聘冻结和裁员，预计到2040年本地物理治疗师将出现超过2,000人的过剩。这一现象形成了"培养人才却无处就业"的矛盾局面。 The Hong Kong Physiotherapy Association has warned the government that funding cuts to social welfare organisations have triggered hiring freezes and job losses, despite continued government subsidies for physiotherapy training, creating a projected surplus of over 2,000 practitioners by 2040. This creates a paradox where public investment develops skilled professionals who cannot be deployed due to budget constraints.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这反映了公共服务领域常见的政策协调失灵问题——人力规划与财政预算脱节，导致教育资源浪费和人才流失风险。随着香港人口老龄化加剧，物理治疗服务需求持续上升，资金紧缩将削弱基层医疗体系应对未来健康挑战的能力。 This reflects a common policy coordination failure in public services—disconnect between workforce planning and fiscal budgeting—leading to wasted educational resources and brain drain risks. With Hong Kong's aging population driving rising demand for physiotherapy, funding constraints will weaken the primary healthcare system's capacity to address future health challenges.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

医疗政策研究者可将此案例纳入"人力资本投资与财政可持续性"的分析框架；物理治疗师个人可考虑跨境执业或转向私营机构、企业健康服务等多元就业渠道；相关NGO可探索与商界合作的社会创新模式，开辟非政府资金来源。 Healthcare policy researchers can incorporate this case into analytical frameworks on "human capital investment versus fiscal sustainability"; individual physiotherapists may explore cross-border licensing, private practice, or corporate wellness services as alternative career paths; relevant NGOs could pursue social innovation models partnering with businesses to diversify funding sources beyond government support.

Could China’s gallium oxide leap leave US F-22 radar 2 generations behind?

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

中国北京邮电大学吴振平团队于2025年2月11日在《Science Advances》发表突破性研究，首次通过实验证实κ-相氧化镓（kappa-gallium oxide）在室温下具有稳定铁电性，可同时实现数据存储和高功率发射功能，将功率器件与存储器合二为一。这一发现标志着第四代半导体材料氧化镓（Ga₂O₃）的关键技术突破，可能使中国在军用雷达等高端电子领域实现跨代领先。
A Chinese team led by Wu Zhenping at Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications published a breakthrough study in *Science Advances* on February 11, 2025, experimentally confirming that kappa-gallium oxide exhibits stable ferroelectricity at room temperature—enabling simultaneous data storage and high-power transmission in a single device. This discovery marks a critical advance in fourth-generation semiconductor material gallium oxide (Ga₂O₃), potentially allowing China to leapfrog generations in military radar and other high-end electronics. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

该技术可能使中美军用雷达技术差距扩大至两代：中国现役歼-10、歼-20、歼-35已采用第三代氮化镓（GaN）雷达，而美国F-22仍依赖老旧的砷化镓（GaAs）系统；氧化镓作为第四代半导体，具有更高击穿电压、更低损耗和更小体积优势，结合存算一体特性可大幅压缩雷达等设备的尺寸与功耗。这不仅关乎军事装备代差，更意味着中国在半导体材料原创创新领域从"追赶"转向"领跑"，可能重塑全球高端芯片产业格局。
This technology could widen the Sino-US military radar gap to two generations: China's active J-10, J-20, and J-35 fighters already employ third-generation GaN radars, while the US F-22 still relies on aging GaAs systems; gallium oxide as a fourth-generation semiconductor offers higher breakdown voltage, lower losses, and smaller size, with integrated memory functionality further reducing device footprint and power consumption. Beyond military implications, this signals China's shift from "catch-up" to "leadership" in original semiconductor material innovation, potentially reshaping the global high-end chip industry landscape. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

技术从业者应密切关注氧化镓产业链（衬底、外延、器件设计）的投资与职业机会，特别是电力电子、射频通信、存算一体芯片等交叉领域；研究者可将铁电半导体、超宽禁带材料作为前沿方向，探索κ-Ga₂O₃在神经形态计算、功率集成电路中的新应用。对于政策与产业观察者，需跟踪中美在第四代半导体材料标准、专利布局和设备禁运方面的博弈动态，评估技术脱钩风险与替代路径。
Technology professionals should monitor investment and career opportunities across the gallium oxide supply chain (substrates, epitaxy, device design), especially at intersections of power electronics, RF communications, and memory-compute integration; researchers may explore ferroelectric semiconductors and ultra-wide bandgap materials as frontiers, investigating novel applications of κ-Ga₂O₃ in neuromorphic computing and power integrated circuits. For policy and industry observers, tracking US-China dynamics in fourth-generation semiconductor standards, patent deployment, and equipment sanctions is essential to assess decoupling risks and alternative pathways.

Judge quashes subpoenas of Fed chair, says investigation was ‘politically motivated’

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

美国联邦法官James Boasberg于周五撤销了美国司法部向美联储发出的传票，裁定这项针对美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查"出于政治动机"。该调查由特朗普任命的美国检察官Jeanine Pirro于1月发起，法官认为大量证据表明传票的真实目的是向鲍威尔施压，要求其服从特朗普总统反复提出的降息要求。
A federal judge, James Boasberg, quashed US Justice Department subpoenas issued to the Federal Reserve on Friday, ruling that the investigation into Fed Chair Jerome Powell was "politically motivated." The probe was launched in January by Trump-appointed US Attorney Jeanine Pirro, but the judge found that abundant evidence suggested the subpoenas' true purpose was to pressure Powell into complying with President Trump's repeated demands for interest rate cuts. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这一裁决维护了美联储的独立性，这是美国货币政策体系的基石，防止行政权力通过司法手段干预利率决策。事件也揭示了特朗普政府试图打破传统"央行独立性"规范的持续努力，以及司法系统在此类政治压力下所能发挥的制衡作用。共和党参议员Thom Tillis此前已因此事阻止特朗普提名的鲍威尔继任者，显示该争议在国会同样引发跨党派关切。
This ruling safeguards the Federal Reserve's independence—a cornerstone of US monetary policy—and prevents executive overreach into interest rate decisions through judicial means. The case also illustrates the ongoing Trump administration efforts to erode traditional central bank autonomy norms, while demonstrating the judiciary's role as a check on such political pressure. The controversy had already sparked bipartisan concern in Congress, with Republican Senator Thom Tillis blocking Trump's nominee to replace Powell. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注美联储独立性相关的法律判例和政策辩论，以理解货币政策与政治干预的边界。在投资或商业决策中，将央行独立性风险纳入宏观经济分析框架，评估政治压力对利率路径的潜在影响。跟踪Jeanine Pirro的上诉进展及国会相关立法动态，预判美国货币政策制度框架的可能演变。
Monitor legal precedents and policy debates around central bank independence to understand boundaries between monetary policy and political interference. Incorporate central bank independence risks into macroeconomic analysis for investment or business decisions, assessing how political pressure may affect interest rate trajectories. Track Pirro's appeal and relevant congressional developments to anticipate potential evolution of US monetary policy institutional frameworks.

China announces AI boost to radar as drone swarms confound detectors in Iran war

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

中国顶级雷达专家徐进宣布，中国正在将人工智能技术应用于防空雷达系统，以应对低成本自杀式无人机蜂群带来的探测挑战。这一技术突破源于美伊冲突中无人机蜂群使传统雷达系统难以应对的实战经验，旨在让雷达能够从多角度观察移动目标并识别诱饵无人机。 China's top radar expert Xu Jin announced that China is applying AI technology to air-defence radar systems to address detection challenges posed by low-cost suicide drone swarms. This technological breakthrough stems from the practical combat experience in the US-Iran conflict where drone swarms overwhelmed traditional radar systems, aiming to enable radars to observe moving targets from multiple angles and identify decoy drones.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

无人机蜂群战术正在改变现代战争形态，传统雷达因处理能力不足而难以应对大规模、低成本、可协同的无人机威胁，这一技术差距直接关系到国家防空安全。中国此举反映了全球军事科技竞争的新焦点——AI与雷达融合的反无人机能力，可能成为未来国防科技的关键制高点。 Drone swarm tactics are transforming modern warfare, and traditional radars struggle to counter large-scale, low-cost, coordinated drone threats due to insufficient processing power—a technological gap directly linked to national air defence security. China's move reflects the new focal point of global military technology competition: AI-radar fusion for counter-drone capabilities, which may become a critical high ground in future defence technology.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注AI与边缘计算在实时信号处理领域的交叉应用，这类技术可延伸至智能交通监控、低空物流管理或大型活动安防等民用场景。对于技术从业者，可研究多目标跟踪算法、动态信息融合及小目标识别等核心技术模块，寻找军民两用技术的转化机会。 Pay attention to the intersection of AI and edge computing in real-time signal processing, as such technologies can extend to civilian scenarios like intelligent traffic monitoring, low-altitude logistics management, or large-scale event security. For technology practitioners, research core technical modules such as multi-target tracking algorithms, dynamic information fusion, and small target identification to explore conversion opportunities for dual-use technologies.

Is Bali’s Kuta Beach disappearing? Coastal erosion crisis threatens famed shoreline

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章报道了巴厘岛著名旅游胜地库塔海滩正面临严重的海岸侵蚀危机，极端天气和数十年的沿海开发加剧了这一问题，导致部分区域 shoreline 状况危急。 This article reports on the severe coastal erosion crisis facing Kuta Beach, a famous tourist destination in Bali, where extreme weather and decades of coastal development have worsened the situation, leaving some areas of the shoreline in critical condition.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

海岸侵蚀不仅威胁巴厘岛的核心旅游资产和经济命脉，也反映了气候变化与过度开发叠加的全球性沿海城市困境，为其他依赖海滩旅游的地区敲响警钟。 The erosion threatens not only Bali's core tourism asset and economic lifeline but also reflects a global dilemma facing coastal cities where climate change meets overdevelopment, serving as a warning for other beach-dependent destinations worldwide.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

可将此案例用于研究可持续旅游规划、海岸工程防护策略，或作为气候变化影响评估的教学素材；相关行业从业者也可借此审视自身项目的生态韧性设计。 This case can be used to study sustainable tourism planning, coastal engineering protection strategies, or as teaching material for climate impact assessment; industry practitioners may also use it to review the ecological resilience design of their own projects.

HKEX opens door for diverse innovative firms to list, expand confidential filings, with biggest reforms since 2018

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

香港交易所（HKEX）宣布了自2018年以来最大规模的上市制度改革，包括降低同股不同权（WVR）公司的上市门槛至200亿港元（约为原来的一半），并将保密提交上市申请的选项扩展至所有新上市申请人，此前该选项仅适用于二次上市或特定科技企业。
HKEX has announced its biggest listing reforms since 2018, including lowering the minimum valuation threshold for weighted voting rights (WVR) companies to HK$20 billion (half of the previous requirement) and expanding the confidential filing option to all new listing applicants, which was previously limited to secondary listings or certain technology companies.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

此次改革旨在应对美国、英国、新加坡和日本等竞争对手交易所的吸引IPO政策，防止香港因上市门槛过高而流失潜在的创新型企业。这反映了全球资本市场对科技和创新企业的激烈争夺，以及香港巩固其国际金融中心地位的战略调整。
These reforms aim to counter competitive measures from rival exchanges in the US, UK, Singapore and Japan to attract IPOs, preventing Hong Kong from losing potential innovative firms due to high listing barriers. This reflects the global capital markets' intense competition for technology and innovation companies, as well as Hong Kong's strategic adjustment to consolidate its position as an international financial center.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

对于投资者，可关注即将登陆港股的中小型创新企业投资机会，尤其是估值在200-400亿港元区间的科技公司；对于创业者或企业高管，可重新评估香港作为上市地的可行性，特别是考虑保密提交选项带来的战略灵活性；对于金融从业者，需深入研究新规细则，为客户提供上市路径规划的专业建议。
For investors, watch for opportunities in smaller innovative companies, especially tech firms valued between HK$20-40 billion, that may now qualify for HKEX listing. For entrepreneurs or executives, reassess Hong Kong's feasibility as a listing venue, particularly considering the strategic flexibility offered by confidential filing. For finance professionals, study the new rules in detail to provide clients with professional guidance on listing pathway planning.

US-China trade talks: what to expect as senior officials meet in Paris

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

本文报道了中美两国高级官员于3月14日至17日在巴黎举行贸易谈判的背景与预期。此次会谈旨在为月底特朗普与习近平的峰会铺路，而非寻求重大突破，双方目前倾向于维持"贸易休战"状态。
This article reports on the background and expectations for trade negotiations between senior US and Chinese officials in Paris from March 14-17. The talks aim to set the stage for a summit between Trump and Xi later this month rather than seek major breakthroughs, with both sides currently inclined to maintain a "trade truce."

为什么重要 / Why it matters

短期内的贸易稳定对两国各有政治经济考量：中国需要稳定的国际环境以应对国内挑战，美国则聚焦11月中期选举。官媒《人民日报》以"钟声"笔名发文，释放了中国愿与美方"共同伟大"的合作信号，显示双方均有管控分歧的意愿。
Short-term trade stability serves distinct political and economic purposes: China needs a stable international environment to address domestic challenges, while the US focuses on November's midterm elections. The People's Daily's "Zhong Sheng" commentary signals China's willingness to pursue "shared greatness" with the US, indicating mutual interest in managing differences.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注月底峰会前的政策风向与具体议题释放，预判关税、技术管制等领域的谈判节奏。若从事跨境业务，可利用当前窗口期评估供应链布局与合同风险；若做投资，需警惕"休战"脆弱性及中期选举后政策转向的可能性。
Monitor policy signals and specific issues released before the month-end summit to anticipate negotiation rhythms in tariffs and tech controls. For cross-border business, use the current window to assess supply chain positioning and contract risks; for investors, remain alert to the fragility of the "truce" and potential policy shifts after the midterm elections.

Australia walks ‘very fine line’ with Gulf deployment amid Iran war

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

澳大利亚决定向海湾地区派遣E-7A"楔尾"预警机和空对空导弹，以协助地区国家防御伊朗的持续报复性袭击。这一部署是在以色列与伊朗冲突升级的背景下做出的，体现了澳大利亚在支持盟友与避免深度卷入战争之间的谨慎平衡。
Australia has decided to deploy an E-7A Wedgetail surveillance aircraft and air-to-air missiles to the Gulf region to assist regional countries in defending against ongoing Iranian retaliatory attacks. This deployment comes amid escalating conflict between Israel and Iran, reflecting Australia's careful balancing act between supporting allies and avoiding deeper military entanglement. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这一决策凸显了中等强国在美国联盟压力与地区冲突风险之间的外交困境，也反映了AUKUS安全伙伴关系对澳大利亚战略自主性的约束。分析师指出，堪培拉正"走一条非常细的线"——既要向受伊朗攻击的伙伴发出支持信号，又要避免承诺参与进攻性行动，同时还需维护与特朗普政府的密切防务关系。
This decision highlights the diplomatic dilemma facing middle powers between US alliance pressure and regional conflict risks, while also reflecting how the AUKUS security partnership constrains Australia's strategic autonomy. Analysts note that Canberra is "walking a very fine line"—signaling support for partners under Iranian attack while avoiding commitments to offensive operations, all while maintaining close defense ties with the Trump administration. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

可借此案例分析小国/中等强国在大国竞争中的"对冲战略"（hedging strategy）实践，特别是如何在安全承诺与冲突规避之间寻找平衡点。对于关注印太安全或联盟政治的研究者，可进一步追踪AUKUS框架下成员国在第三方冲突中的协调机制与决策差异。
This case can be used to analyze "hedging strategy" practices by small and middle powers in great power competition, particularly how they balance security commitments with conflict avoidance. For researchers focusing on Indo-Pacific security or alliance politics, further tracking of coordination mechanisms and decision-making divergences among AUKUS members in third-party conflicts would be valuable.

Will Paracels dispute overshadow China and Vietnam’s drive for stronger strategic ties?

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章报道了中国与越南即将举行首次"3+3"战略对话，涵盖外交、国防和公共安全三个领域的高层部长级会谈。会谈背景是近期卫星图像显示中国可能在南沙群岛的羚羊礁（Antelope Reef）开始填海造地作业，引发越南关注。
This article reports that China and Vietnam are set to hold their first "3+3" strategic dialogue, a high-level ministerial meeting covering diplomacy, defense, and public security. The talks come against the backdrop of recent satellite imagery suggesting China may have started land reclamation work at Antelope Reef in the Paracel Islands, raising concerns in Vietnam. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

此次会谈体现了中越双方在领土争议持续存在的情况下，仍试图建立制度化沟通渠道以管控分歧的战略意图。"3+3"机制的建立标志着两国关系从传统双边外交向更全面、更深入的安全合作层面拓展，对南海地区稳定具有示范效应。
This meeting demonstrates the strategic intention of both China and Vietnam to establish institutionalized communication channels for managing disputes despite ongoing territorial tensions. The creation of the "3+3" mechanism signifies an expansion of bilateral relations from traditional diplomacy toward more comprehensive security cooperation, offering a model for regional stability in the South China Sea. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注此类多边安全对话机制的设计逻辑，可为分析其他区域大国关系（如中日、中印）提供比较框架。对于从事国际商务或跨境投资的人士，可借此评估地缘政治风险与双边合作机遇之间的动态平衡，制定更具韧性的区域策略。
Understanding the design logic of such multilateral security dialogue mechanisms provides a comparative framework for analyzing other major power relationships (such as China-Japan or China-India). For professionals in international business or cross-border investment, this case offers insights into balancing geopolitical risks with bilateral cooperation opportunities, enabling more resilient regional strategies.

US-Israeli war on Iran makes a mockery of global governance rules

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章是一篇评论文章，批评美国和以色列对伊朗的军事行动违背了全球治理的基本原则。作者指出，真正的治理应基于规则制衡、自我约束和对"永久战争"最终导致自我毁灭的谦逊认知，而当前的单边军事行动缺乏审慎考量、国内支持、国际认可以及明确的退出策略。
This is an opinion piece criticizing US-Israeli military actions against Iran as a violation of fundamental global governance principles. The author argues that true governance should be based on checks and balances, self-restraint, and humble recognition that "forever wars" often lead to self-destruction, whereas current unilateral military actions lack careful deliberation, domestic support, international endorsement, and clear exit strategies.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这篇文章揭示了国际秩序面临的深层危机：当大国绕过联合国等国际机制单方面动武时，全球治理规则形同虚设。作者通过历史教训警告，仅靠空中力量实现政权更替极少成功，反而制造混乱而非民主，这种"以战求霸"的模式正在将世界分裂为"追求和平和谐"与"争夺主导地位"的两大阵营。
This article reveals a deep crisis facing the international order: when major powers bypass mechanisms like the UN to use force unilaterally, global governance rules become meaningless. Through historical lessons, the author warns that regime change through air power alone rarely succeeds, instead creating chaos rather than democracy—this "fighting for dominance" model is splitting the world into two camps: those pursuing peace and harmony versus those seeking hegemony.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

作为技术从业者，可将此分析框架应用于评估地缘政治风险对全球供应链、数据中心布局及跨境数据流动的影响；在AI治理、网络安全等国际规则制定中，倡导多边协商机制而非单边强制措施；同时培养批判性思维，在信息迷雾中辨别多方信源，避免被单一叙事主导决策。
As technology professionals, we can apply this analytical framework to assess geopolitical risks' impact on global supply chains, data center placement, and cross-border data flows; advocate for multilateral consultation mechanisms rather than unilateral coercive measures in international rule-making for AI governance and cybersecurity; and cultivate critical thinking to identify multiple sources amid information fog, avoiding single-narrative-driven decisions.

US downplays Strait of Hormuz concerns as Trump claims ‘there’s nothing to be afraid of’

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章报道了特朗普政府淡化霍尔木兹海峡被有效封锁的影响，同时透露美国正派遣两栖攻击舰和海军陆战队前往该地区，但几乎未披露恢复石油运输的具体措施。特朗普在采访中称"没什么好怕的"，并暗示可能为油轮护航，但未做出明确决定。
This article reports on the Trump administration's efforts to downplay the impact of the Strait of Hormuz's effective closure, while revealing that the US is sending an amphibious assault ship and Marines to the region with few details disclosed on how to restore oil flows. In an interview, Trump stated "there's nothing to be afraid of" and hinted at potentially escorting tankers without making a definitive decision.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

霍尔木兹海峡是全球约20%石油运输的关键通道，其封锁将直接影响全球能源供应和价格稳定。特朗普政府"强硬表态+模糊行动"的策略反映出地缘政治博弈中的不确定性，这种不确定性本身就可能引发市场波动和区域安全局势升级。
The Strait of Hormuz is a critical channel for about 20% of global oil shipments, and its closure directly impacts worldwide energy supply and price stability. The Trump administration's strategy of "tough rhetoric with vague action" reflects uncertainty in geopolitical gamesmanship, which itself may trigger market volatility and escalation of regional security tensions.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

关注能源期货和航运保险市场的实时动态，将地缘政治风险纳入投资组合的波动率评估。对于从事国际贸易或能源行业的从业者，可建立区域冲突情景下的供应链应急预案，并跟踪美军部署动向作为风险预警信号。
Monitor real-time dynamics in energy futures and shipping insurance markets, incorporating geopolitical risk into portfolio volatility assessments. For professionals in international trade or energy sectors, establish supply chain contingency plans under regional conflict scenarios and track US military deployment movements as risk warning signals.

Beijing warns US over Jimmy Lai, Hong Kong and Taiwan arms sales ahead of Trump visit

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

本文报道了中国外交部在北京对美国政府发出警告，涉及香港《苹果日报》创办人黎智英案、香港问题及台湾军售等议题，时值特朗普可能访华前夕。中国外交部发言人郭嘉昆指责外部势力干涉香港司法程序和中国内政，并强调黎智英"应依法受到严惩"。
This article reports on a warning issued by Beijing to the U.S. government regarding the case of Jimmy Lai (founder of Hong Kong's Apple Daily), Hong Kong issues, and Taiwan arms sales, ahead of a potential visit by Donald Trump. Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun accused external forces of interfering in Hong Kong's judicial process and China's internal affairs, emphasizing that Lai "should be severely punished according to the law."

为什么重要 / Why it matters

此事凸显中美地缘政治博弈中"人权/法治"与"主权/不干涉内政"两套话语体系的持续冲突，香港国安法案件已成为两国关系的敏感试金石。同时，北京选择在特朗普可能访华前主动设限，显示出中国在谈判桌前"先声夺人"的策略意图，也暗示香港问题可能被纳入更广泛的中美交易框架。
This incident highlights the ongoing clash between the two competing frameworks—"human rights/rule of law" versus "sovereignty/non-interference in internal affairs"—in the China-U.S. geopolitical rivalry, with Hong Kong national security cases becoming a sensitive touchstone for bilateral relations. Additionally, Beijing's decision to draw red lines ahead of Trump's potential visit demonstrates China's strategy of "setting the tone first" at the negotiating table, while also suggesting that Hong Kong issues may be drawn into a broader U.S.-China transactional framework.

我能用什么 / How I can use it

对于关注跨境合规的企业，可借此理解地缘政治风险如何具体化为法律与商业制裁的交织；对于政策研究者，可追踪"人道主义释放"与"制裁放宽"是否会成为中美谈判的潜在交换筹码。此外，媒体与NGO工作者可分析此案例中"司法独立"叙事与"外部干涉"指控的话语对抗策略。
For businesses concerned with cross-border compliance, this case illustrates how geopolitical risks materialize through the interplay of legal actions and commercial sanctions. For policy researchers, it offers a lens to track whether "humanitarian release" and "sanctions easing" could become potential bargaining chips in U.S.-China negotiations. Additionally, journalists and NGO workers can analyze the discursive strategies employed in this case, particularly the clash between narratives of "judicial independence" and accusations of "external interference."

Coffee News Recap, 13 Mar: Brazil & Vietnam coffee exports fell in February, RFK Jr. challenges Starbucks and Dunkin’ over sugar levels & other stories

Perfect Daily Grind

是什么 / What it is

本周咖啡行业新闻回顾涵盖多个关键动态：美国卫生部长RFK Jr.公开质疑星巴克和Dunkin'的高糖饮品安全性；巴西和越南两大咖啡出口国2月出口量双双下滑；联合国正式将10月1日定为国际咖啡日；以及多家咖啡企业的战略扩张与高管变动。
This week's coffee industry news recap covers several key developments: US Health Secretary RFK Jr. publicly challenged Starbucks and Dunkin' over the safety of their high-sugar beverages; both Brazil and Vietnam—two major coffee exporters—saw declines in February exports; the UN officially designated October 1st as International Coffee Day; and multiple coffee companies announced strategic expansions and executive changes. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这些动态反映了咖啡行业正面临健康监管压力、供应链波动与可持续发展要求的三重挑战。
RFK Jr.的举措可能推动功能性咖啡市场加速增长；巴西越南出口下滑预示全球咖啡供应趋紧与价格波动风险；EUDR法规扩展至速溶咖啡则凸显合规成本上升。同时，联合国认证国际咖啡日标志着咖啡的文化经济地位获得全球正式认可。 These developments reflect the coffee industry's triple challenges of health regulatory pressure, supply chain volatility, and sustainability requirements. RFK Jr.'s actions may accelerate growth in the functional coffee market; declining exports from Brazil and Vietnam signal tightening global supply and price volatility risks; and EUDR regulations extending to instant coffee highlight rising compliance costs. Meanwhile, UN recognition of International Coffee Day marks coffee's cultural and economic status gaining formal global acknowledgment. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

**行业从业者**：关注功能性咖啡配方创新，提前布局低糖/健康产品线；监测巴西越南产区动态，优化采购策略与库存管理；追踪EUDR合规要求，确保供应链可追溯性。**消费者/爱好者**：选择透明披露糖含量的品牌，支持可持续采购的咖啡企业；利用10月1日国际咖啡日参与行业活动或推广咖啡文化。**投资者/研究者**：分析健康趋势对连锁咖啡估值的影响，评估气候与政策因素对咖啡期货的长期作用。 **Industry professionals**: Focus on functional coffee formulation innovation and preemptively develop low-sugar/health-oriented product lines; monitor Brazil and Vietnam origin dynamics to optimize sourcing strategies and inventory management; track EUDR compliance requirements to ensure supply chain traceability. **Consumers/enthusiasts**: Choose brands with transparent sugar disclosure and support sustainably sourced coffee enterprises; leverage October 1st International Coffee Day to participate in industry events or promote coffee culture. **Investors/researchers**: Analyze health trends' impact on chain coffee valuations and assess climate and policy factors' long-term effects on coffee futures.

Chinese man posts a big note on mother-in-law’s suitcase to seek help for her solo travel

SCMP Business

是什么 / What it is

这是一则关于中国西安一位女婿为不识字、不会说普通话的60多岁岳母准备首次独自乘机的暖心故事。他在岳母行李箱上贴了一张详细说明其特殊情况、航班信息及求助方式的巨型便条，并在线寻求同航班乘客的帮助。
This is a heartwarming story about a son-in-law from Xi'an, China who prepared his 60-something illiterate mother-in-law for her first solo flight. He posted a giant note on her suitcase detailing her special conditions, flight information, and how to help, while also seeking assistance online from fellow passengers. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这个故事展现了数字时代"众包互助"解决弱势群体出行困境的创新方式，突破了航空公司服务覆盖不足的缺口。超过百万网友被触动，反映出社会对老龄化、数字鸿沟及乡村留守老人问题的广泛关注与情感共鸣。
This story demonstrates an innovative "crowdsourced mutual aid" approach in the digital age to address travel challenges faced by vulnerable groups, filling gaps left by insufficient airline services. The story resonated with over a million netizens, reflecting widespread social concern and emotional resonance regarding aging, digital divides, and left-behind rural elderly. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

可为家中不擅长智能设备的老人制作类似的"可视化出行指南"，包含关键信息卡片、紧急联系人二维码及醒目标识。也可借鉴此模式，在社区或社交平台建立"互助出行"志愿网络，或为特殊需求旅客设计更完善的航司/交通服务方案。
You can create similar "visual travel guides" for elderly family members unfamiliar with smart devices, including key info cards, emergency contact QR codes, and eye-catching labels. Alternatively, adapt this model to build community or social platform-based "mutual aid travel" volunteer networks, or advocate for improved airline/transportation services tailored to special-needs travelers.

Nintendo’s Family BASIC Keyboard Gets USB Upgrade

Hackaday

是什么 / What it is

这篇文章介绍了技术爱好者 Lucas Leadbetter 将任天堂 1984 年为 Famicom 游戏机推出的 Family BASIC 键盘改装为 USB 设备的项目。他利用 Adafruit KB2040 开发板（基于 RP2040 芯片）和开源 QMK 固件，让这个近 40 年前的复古键盘能够在现代电脑上使用。
This article covers a project by hobbyist Lucas Leadbetter who converted Nintendo's 1984 Family BASIC keyboard—originally released for the Famicom console—into a USB-compatible device. Using an Adafruit KB2040 board (RP2040-based) and the open-source QMK firmware, he made this nearly 40-year-old vintage keyboard usable on modern computers. ---

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这个项目展示了如何通过现代开源硬件和固件生态（如 QMK 和 RP2040）来复活复古计算设备，降低了对专有硬件的依赖。它也体现了硬件逆向工程社区的知识共享精神，NESdev wiki 和 Circuit Rewind 等资源的积累让后来者能够快速复现和改进。
This project demonstrates how modern open-source hardware and firmware ecosystems (like QMK and RP2040) can revive vintage computing equipment while reducing reliance on proprietary hardware. It also reflects the knowledge-sharing spirit of the hardware reverse-engineering community, where accumulated resources like NESdev wiki and Circuit Rewind enable others to replicate and improve upon the work. ---

我能用什么 / How I can use it

如果你有复古键盘或游戏外设，可以参考这种"矩阵扫描 + 开源固件 + USB 微控制器"的模式进行现代化改造；GitHub 上的开源文件为类似项目提供了可直接复用的代码基础。对于键盘爱好者而言，这也是学习 QMK 固件定制和硬件逆向工程的实践案例。
If you have vintage keyboards or gaming peripherals, you can apply this "matrix scanning + open-source firmware + USB microcontroller" approach for modernization; the open-source files on GitHub provide reusable code for similar projects. For keyboard enthusiasts, this also serves as a practical case study for learning QMK firmware customization and hardware reverse engineering.

Perfecting the Shape-Changing Fruit Bowl

Hackaday

是什么 / What it is

这是一篇关于创客Simone Giertz设计可变形状水果碗的项目报道。该项目采用类似相机光圈的机械结构（iris mechanism），使碗的底座能够径向扩展，从而根据水果数量自动调整容量，解决了传统水果碗要么太空、要么太满的常见问题。
This is a project report about maker Simone Giertz's design of a shape-changing fruit bowl. The project uses an iris mechanism similar to a camera aperture, allowing the bowl's base to expand radially and automatically adjust its capacity based on the amount of fruit, solving the common problem of traditional fruit bowls being either too empty or too full.

为什么重要 / Why it matters

这个项目展示了硬件产品开发中功能性与美学平衡的真实挑战——从"能用"到"好看且能量产"往往需要更多的迭代周期。
